---
title: Aziz Goza
image: ../../images/azizgoza.jpeg
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/abdoul-aziz-goza-86402090/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/azizGoza
---

With over 15 years of experience across Africa and Asia, I am a nutrition and statistics specialist dedicated to strengthening large-scale child nutrition data systems. My career has been deeply rooted in the Sahel region including Senegal, Mauritania, Mali, Burkina Faso, and Niger where I formerly served as a UNICEF Emergency Health and Nutrition Specialist.

I specialise in the end-to-end management of nutrition issues, from planning and implementation to monitoring and evaluation. I have managed and designed complex nutrition survey programs (including KAP, LQAS, [SQUEAC/SLEAC](https://www.fantaproject.org/sites/default/files/resources/SQUEAC-SLEAC-Technical-Reference-Oct2012_0.pdf), and [SMART](https://smartmethodology.org/)) and have expertise in developing and implementing innovative measurement methodologies.

My technical background is grounded in advanced epidemiology and biostatistics. I leverage mHealth technologies ([ODK](https://getodk.org/), [Dimagi](https://dimagi.com/)) and software tools like [R](https://r-project.org), Power BI, SPSS, Sphinx, [EpiData](https://www.epidata.dk/), and [ENA for SMART](https://smartmethodology.org/survey-planning-tools/smart-emergency-nutrition-assessment/) to build automated data workflows. Whether I am transforming datasets into actionable insights, designing databases, or leading community mobilisation and adult training, my ultimate goal is to support evidence-based health and nutrition programming.

I currently serve as the Executive Director of nutriverse.
